template.name: OCG: BELKA NORM
template.css_template: .lt-container { position: relative;   width: 1920px; height: 1080px; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.5s; } .lt-container.active { opacity: 1; } .lower-third-canvas { display: block; width: var(--v-width, 100%); height: 100%; }
